title: Diana Hoff
html:
Diana Hoff

Scholarship-orbit mentor — first met Yahir at the 2019 Young Entrepreneurs Business Week in Eugene, Oregon, during the mock-interview portion of the camp. Two years later, when Yahir was navigating the Renaissance Scholarship application, she became a re-engaged mentor target.

TL;DR

  • 2019 — first introduced to Yahir at YEBW Eugene mock-interview session.
  • April 13, 2021 — Yahir drafts and sends a re-engagement email asking for guidance on his Renaissance Scholarship May resubmission (2021 04 13 diana hoff renaissance email).
  • June 14, 2021 — abandoned email draft to her (2021 06 14 dave fafsa jann renaissance — opens "Dear Diana Hoff," but never finishes).
  • July 6, 2021 — appears in summer todos as a contact-target (2021 07 06 contact diana hoff summer todos).
  • Plays the same role-shape as Jann: adult woman Yahir owes formal gratitude correspondence to in the Ford / Renaissance scholarship orbit.

Notes

Diana Hoff is a recurring node in Yahir's mentors-from-afar cluster — a contact made in a structured high-school setting (YEBW) that Yahir reactivates years later when he needs strategic guidance. The emails preserved in the vault show Yahir's debt of gratitude template at work: open with the gratitude memory, frame the ask as continuation of an existing relationship, never lead with the request.

Outcome: Yahir was not selected for the Renaissance Scholarship in either deadline (Feb or May 2021), but the Ford Family Foundation scholarship landed and funded undergrad anyway.

Connections
